={
  "src_ip": "{{ $('Prepare Data').first().json.src_ip }}",

  "threat_type": "{{ $('Prepare Data').first().json.threat_type }}",
  "mitre": "{{ $('Prepare Data').first().json.mitre }}",
  "anomaly_score": 0,
  "triggered_by": "auto_escalation"
}
